channel.title: Armis, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Armis, Inc. (armis).

item.title: CVE-2025-52551 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Proprietary protocol allows for unauthenticated file operations
item.description: E2 Facility Management Systems use a proprietary protocol that allows for unauthenticated file operations on any file in the file system.

item.title: CVE-2025-52550 · 8.6 HIGH — Firmware upgrade packages are unsigned
item.description: E3 Site Supervisor Control (firmware version < 2.31F01) firmware upgrade packages are unsigned. An attacker can forge malicious firmware upgrade packages. An attacker with admin access to the application services can install a malicious firmware upgr…

item.title: CVE-2025-52549 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Predictable root linux password generation
item.description: E3 Site Supervisor Control (firmware version < 2.31F01) generates the root linux password on each boot. An attacker can generate the root linux password for a vulnerable device based on known or easy to fetch parameters.

item.title: CVE-2025-52548 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Enabling SSH and Shellinabox on the vulnerable machine
item.description: E3 Site Supervisor Control (firmware version < 2.31F01) contains a hidden API call in the application services that enables SSH and Shellinabox, which exist but are disabled by default. An attacker with admin access to the application services can ut…

item.title: CVE-2025-52547 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — DoS to the application services
item.description: E3 Site Supervisor Control (firmware version < 2.31F01) MGW contains an API call that lacks input validation. An attacker can use this command to continuously crash the application services.

item.title: CVE-2025-52546 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Stored XSS by uploading a specially crafted floor plan file
item.description: E3 Site Supervisor Control (firmware version < 2.31F01) has a floor plan feature that allows for an unauthenticated attacker to upload floor plan files. By uploading a specially crafted floor plan file, an attacker can inject a stored XSS to the floo…

item.title: CVE-2025-52545 · 7.7 HIGH — Privilege escalation in the application services
item.description: E3 Site Supervisor Control (firmware version < 2.31F01) RCI service contains an API call to read users info, which returns all usernames and password hashes for the application services.

item.title: CVE-2025-52544 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Arbitrary read file from the filesystem
item.description: E3 Site Supervisor Control (firmware version < 2.31F01) has a floor plan feature that allows for an unauthenticated attacker to upload floor plan files. By uploading a specially crafted floor plan file, an attacker can access any file from the E3 fil…

item.title: CVE-2025-52543 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Login to the application services using only the password hash
item.description: E3 Site Supervisor Control (firmware version < 2.31F01) application services (MGW and RCI) uses client side hashing for authentication. An attacker can authenticate by obtaining only the password hash.

item.title: CVE-2025-6519 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Consistent predictable generation of the password for the default admin user "ONEDAY" to the application services
item.description: E3 Site Supervisor (firmware version < 2.31F01) has a default admin user "ONEDAY" with a daily generated password. An attacker can predictably generate the password for ONEDAY. The oneday user cannot be deleted or modified by any user.
